text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During a basketball match in gym class,
Kawakami Princess is chasing after the ball.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Here, pass it to me! If I get the ball now, I'll be
able to score!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: K-Kawakami! Okay! I know you'll nail it this time!

text_block_list.name: Referee
text_block_list.text: Tweet! That's traveling, Kawakami! You took three steps without dribbling. Other team's ball.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I messed it up again! I'm so sorry, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after that, Kawakami Princess continues
playing recklessly on the court while receiving
warnings from the referee.
